data.title: Harbor Health is expanding across Texas with the acquisition of 32 more clinics, quadrupling its clinical footprint.
data.description: Austin's Harbor Health is expanding its reach across Texas with the acquisition of 32 clinics from VillageMD. The primary and specialty care clinic group and insurance company is accelerating its growth across three new markets in the state. This move marks a significant step in Harbor Health's statewide expansion strategy.

data.title: Talkiatry named in TIME and Statista's Top HealthTech Companies of 2025 for superior mental health care.
data.description: A prominent company in virtual psychiatry, Talkiatry, has been recognized for its innovative approach to improving mental health care. The New York-based company has received an award for its clinician-led model, which aims to enhance access, scale, and quality in the field. Talkiatry is known for providing top-notch psychiatry and therapy services that are covered by insurance, making them easily accessible to a wide range of individuals. The company's efforts have resulted in significant advancements in mental health care, benefiting a large number of people.

data.title: US retirement assets hit record $45.8 trillion in 2nd quarter 2025, up 6.0% from March, accounting for 34% household financial assets.
data.description: As of June 30, 2025, retirement assets in the United States reached $45.8 trillion, marking a 6.0 percent increase from March of the same year. According to a recent report by the Investment Company Institute, these retirement assets comprised 34 percent of all household financial assets in the country.

data.title: Teledyne Fuel Cell aboard Blue Origin's New Shepard rocket advances fuel cell tech for space missions on August 23.
data.description: Teledyne Energy Systems, Inc., a subsidiary of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) headquartered in Hunt Valley, Maryland, recently introduced its Hydrogen Electrical Power System (HEPS) fuel cell aboard Blue Origin’s New Shepard rocket as part of a collaboration with NASA’s Tipping Point initiative. The successful launch took place on August 23. This development marks a significant progress in fuel cell technology aimed at enhancing power systems for upcoming lunar and deep space missions. The HEPS technology is specifically engineered to provide effective and scalable air-independent power for lunar habitats and surface operations.

data.title: 57% of consumers can't identify AI photos, survey shows. Majority confident but wrong test results, especially younger generations.
data.description: In Washington, a recent survey by Clutch on the prevalence of AI-generated images in e-commerce and social media has shed light on a concerning reality: a majority of individuals are unable to distinguish real images from AI-generated ones. The survey found that prior to viewing images, 66% of consumers believed they could accurately identify AI-generated photos. However, upon testing, 57% of these individuals were incorrect. Interestingly, younger generations exhibited slightly higher accuracy rates, although many still failed to correctly identify AI images. Despite their confidence, a significant number of individuals were mistaken, highlighting the widespread prevalence of AI-generated visuals.

data.title: LinkSquares ranked #1 in G2 Fall Mid-Market Grid® for CLM, named Leader for 8th quarter in a row.
data.description: LinkSquares has secured the top spot in the G2 Fall Mid-Market Grid® for Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) in Q3 2025. This marks the company's eighth consecutive quarter as a Leader in the field. G2, the leading software review platform, recognized LinkSquares for its continued excellence in this area. This achievement underscores LinkSquares' consistent performance and reputation as a top player in the industry.

data.title: City of Clarkston partners with Event HelperZ to launch inaugural Farmers Market, offering fresh food and local products.
data.description: The City of Clarkston in Georgia has recently disclosed its collaboration with Event HelperZ to establish the Clarkston Farmers Market. This new marketplace will offer fresh food, locally made items, and opportunities for community involvement. The initiative is set to kick off on a Saturday in September 2025.

data.title: OFN launches Innovation Council and Capital Solutions Accelerator with support from MassMutual Foundation and Mastercard. Providing bold solutions for CDFIs to unlock capital and scale innovation. Washington, Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: The CDFI Innovation Initiative, backed by the MassMutual Foundation and the Mastercard Center for Inclusive Growth, is pushing forward with innovative approaches to assist CDFIs in accessing capital, fostering innovation, and adapting to economic shifts. As of September 18, 2025, the initiative is making significant strides in this direction with substantial support.

data.title: Turnberry Solutions merges with Rise and Shift to enhance AWS offerings, providing comprehensive services for client transformation.
data.description: A company based in Minneapolis, Turnberry Solutions, has recently announced the integration of Rise and Shift, an AWS consultancy, to enhance its AWS capabilities. This move consolidates both entities into a single consulting brand. The integration is expected to significantly boost Turnberry Solutions' expertise in AWS services, offering clients a more comprehensive range of solutions. The merger aims to streamline operations and provide more efficient services to customers.

data.title: Proxet partners with Adyen to innovate payments, scale business growth.	Global financial tech leader accelerates transformation.
data.description: In a press release on September 18, 2025, based in Brookline, Massachusetts, Proxet, a leading global software and data engineering company, revealed a new strategic collaboration with Adyen, a prominent global financial technology company. This partnership aims to revolutionize payment solutions for businesses, enhancing integration and scalability. This news signifies a major shift in the industry as two innovative companies work together to shape the future of payments. This development is set to impact various sectors globally, with both companies bringing their expertise to the table. Stay tuned for updates on the progress and outcomes of this collaboration.

data.title: I-care is building a 18,000m² high-tech facility in Belgium by 2028, creating hundreds of jobs.
data.description: A new facility spanning 18,000 square meters is set to be complete and operational in MONS, Belgium by 2028. The project is predicted to create hundreds of jobs, both directly and indirectly. I-care, renowned for its expertise in predictive maintenance, announced this development on September 18, 2025.

data.title: Chicken Salad Chick opens new restaurant in Dalton, Georgia. Free chicken salad for a year to first 100 guests on Sept 30.
data.description: A fast-casual dining establishment is marking its grand opening in Dalton on September 30, 2025, by giving away free chicken salad for a year to the initial 100 visitors. Chicken Salad Chick, the sole fast-casual eatery specializing in chicken salads across the nation, revealed this exciting news.
